pages.title: 🦎 SUSE AI Assistant
pages.body:
## Your Local AI-Powered System Assistant

openSUSE now includes an optional AI assistant that runs **locally** on your machine — no cloud, no data leaves your computer.

**What it can do:**
• Answer questions about openSUSE system administration
• Explain commands and configuration files
• Help troubleshoot issues using official documentation
• Guide you through your first steps on openSUSE

**Requirements:** Podman + 4 GB RAM
**First connection starts the service automatically.**

Would you like to enable the AI Assistant now?
